zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Sturgeon於大約1427年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，她的父親Richard Sturgeon29歲，母親Joan Cotton16歲。她於大約1445年與Thomas Frowick在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1500年5月16日在英國英格蘭米德萊可易阿林聖 馬也斯享年74歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可易阿林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Sturgeon于大约1427年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，她的父亲Richard Sturgeon29岁，母亲Joan Cotton16岁。她于大约1445年与Thomas Frowick在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1500年5月16日在英国英格兰米德萊可易阿林聖 馬也斯享年74岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可易阿林。

nameMeanings.name: Sturgeon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Suffolk): from Middle English sturgeon ‘sturgeon’ (Old French esturgeon), a nickname related to some characteristic of this fish.
In some cases also an altered form   Sturgill  , a surname of English origin.
In some cases possibly also an Americanized form (translation into English) of Breton or French   Turgeon  .

variants.name: Sturgill
meanings: Altered form of English   Stodgell  . See also   Stogdell  . Compare   Stargell  ,   Sturgell  ,   Sturghill  , and   Sturgeon   2.
History: The ancestor of the Sturgills, Sturgils, Sturghills, Sturgells, Stargel(l)s, etc. was John Stogdell (originally Stodgell) from Somerset, England (see   Stogdell  ).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Sturgeon was born about 1427, in London, Middlesex, England, her father, Richard Sturgeon, was 29 and her mother, Joan Cotton, was 16. She married Thomas Frowick about 1445, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 16 May 1500, in St Mary's, Ealing, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 74, and was buried in Ealing, Middlesex, England.

Elle a épousé Thomas Frowick environ 1445, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 16 mai 1500, à St Mary's, Ealing, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Ealing, Middlesex, Angleterre.

ko.St Mary's, Ealing, Middlesex, England: 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 올잉 스트 마이'스
ko.lifeSummary: Joan Sturgeon(이)가 대략 1427년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Sturgeon(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Cotton(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 대략 1445년 영국에서 Thomas Frowick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1500년 5월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 올잉 스트 마이'스에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 올잉에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Thomas Frowick aproximadamente 1445, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. ru.St Mary's, Ealing, Middlesex, England: ст мэри'с, эалинг, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Sturgeon родилась около 1427 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Sturgeon было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Cotton, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Frowick около 1445 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 16 мая 1500 г. в местности ст мэри'с, эалинг, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности эалинг, миддлесекс, Англия.
